series_metadata.series_description: Includes copies of invoices sent to private physicians, public health clinics, city and county health districts, indivi- duals and other clients utilizing laboratory services provided by the Ohio Department of Health, which remain unpaid. This includes t

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for one year after final payment received or account is satisfactorially recon- ciled. Retain in State Records Center for three years, then des- troy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Wastepaper
